pages.text: As spellcraft evolved, mages naturally specialized. Six great $(l)Schools$() emerged, each devoted to mastering a cluster of related elements:$(br2)$(l)Pyro School$() — Fire and Blood. Aggressive, high damage.$(br)$(l)Cryo School$() — Ice and Wind. Control and defense.$(br)$(l)Storm School$() — Thunder and Sonic. Speed and burst.

$(l)Terra School$() — Earth, Nature, and Poison. Endurance and debuffs.$(br)$(l)Arcane School$() — Holy, Light, Time, and Space. Utility and support.$(br)$(l)Abyss School$() — Void, Dark, Eldritch, and Chaos. Maximum destruction.$(br2)Each school crafted specialized $(l)Robes$() that resonate with their elements, amplifying damage and reducing mana cost. Wearing a full set unlocks a $(l)passive ability$() unique to the school.
